senses.definition: incredibly cute or charming, often causing feelings of affection, delight, or admiration

examples.x: The adorable baby giggled and cooed, bringing joy to everyone around.
The adorable kitten curled up in a ball and purred contentedly in its owner's lap.
The adorable couple held hands and walked along the beach, lost in their love.
The adorable little ducklings followed their mother closely as they waddled by the pond.
The adorable plush toys lined the shelves, tempting children and adults alike.

senses.definition: very popular or cherished among a specific group of people

examples.x: The author’s beloved novels have been enjoyed by readers for generations.
Her grandmother’s beloved recipes are passed down in the family.
This café is a beloved spot for locals to gather and relax.
The beloved teacher retired after 40 years of inspiring students.

senses.definition: involved in or relating to a long-term relationship

examples.x: They were in a committed relationship, devoted to each other's happiness and well-being.
The committed partners shared a deep love and understanding.
As a committed pair, they navigated life's ups and downs together.
The committed spouses faced challenges head-on, united in their dedication to each other.
The couple decided to become committed to each other after dating for several months.

senses.definition: filled with joy, often as a result of experiencing something magical or captivating

examples.x: His eyes were filled with an enchanted glow as he watched the ballet performance unfold on stage.

senses.definition: sexually attractive or desirable

examples.x: She found herself drawn to him because she thought he was hot.
In the movie, the main character is depicted as a hot and desirable bachelor.
The romance novel described the male protagonist as incredibly hot, driving the female characters wild with desire.
Despite their attempts to hide their feelings, it was clear they both found each other hot.
He was known around school as the hot guy everyone had a crush on.

senses.definition: feeling cherished, valued, and deeply cared for by others

examples.x: The rescued cat purred contentedly in its new home, finally feeling loved and safe.

senses.definition: expressing deep affection, care, and compassion toward others
affected by love in a way that causes one to act or think unclearly

examples.x: She was lovesick and couldn’t stop thinking about him after their first date.
His friends teased him for being so lovesick over his new girlfriend.
Being lovesick, she found it hard to focus on anything other than her crush.
The lovesick teenager daydreamed about seeing her crush at school.
She wandered through the park, lovesick and lost in thought.

senses.definition: someone who desires a specific person in a romantic or sexual way

examples.x: She received a bouquet of flowers from a secret admirer.
He has been her admirer for years but has never worked up the courage to ask her out.
He was flattered to discover that he had several admirers at work.
She found out that her admirer had been leaving anonymous notes in her locker.
He was flattered to discover that he had several admirers at work.

senses.definition: a person whom one is married to or is in a romantic relationship with

examples.x: As soon as they met, they knew they had found their other half and embarked on a lifelong journey together.
Mary's better half surprised her with a romantic dinner to celebrate their anniversary.
Nicholas and his better half, Rachel, have been happily married for over 20 years.

senses.definition: a couple who are very affectionate and show their love for each other

examples.x: The lovebirds enjoyed a quiet evening together, holding hands and sharing laughs.
They were known around town as the lovebirds who always walked arm in arm.
The elderly lovebirds celebrated their 50th wedding anniversary with a heartfelt ceremony.
Every Valentine's Day, the park is filled with lovebirds enjoying picnics and romantic walks.

senses.definition: one's partner, wife, or husband with whom one has a long-term sexual or romantic relationship

examples.x: She introduced her significant other to her family at the holiday gathering.
They've been together for years, and he's her significant other in every sense of the term.
He surprised his significant other with a weekend getaway to celebrate their anniversary.
The company's holiday party invites employees to bring their significant others to join in the festivities.
She relied on her significant other for emotional support during a challenging time in her career.

senses.definition: the date on which a special event happened in a previous year

examples.x: Today marks the anniversary of the company’s founding.
We always take a trip on our anniversary to commemorate the day we met.
The couple exchanged gifts to mark their tenth anniversary.
This weekend is the anniversary of when we moved into our new home.

senses.definition: a man on his wedding day or just before or after it

examples.x: The bridegroom was nervous but excited as he waited at the altar.
Everyone cheered as the bridegroom kissed the bride after they said their vows.
The bridegroom gave a heartfelt speech during the wedding reception.
As the bridegroom, he took care of all the last-minute details on the big day.
The bridegroom gave a heartfelt speech during the wedding reception.

senses.definition: to ask a person to marry one

examples.x: On a beautiful evening, he chose to propose to his girlfriend with a ring.
She felt a mix of emotions when he knelt down to propose in front of their favorite landmark.
The romantic beach setting provided the perfect backdrop for him to propose.
After months of planning, he finally found the courage to propose during a special dinner.
He nervously proposed to his longtime girlfriend with a heartfelt speech.

senses.definition: the action of asking a person to marry one

examples.x: He surprised her with a romantic proposal at sunset on the beach.
The proposal took place during their vacation to Paris, under the Eiffel Tower.
She happily accepted his proposal and they started planning the wedding.
His proposal was simple but heartfelt, and she immediately said yes.
After years of dating, his proposal finally came on their anniversary.

senses.definition: a state of great sorrow and sadness caused by the ending of a romantic relationship or the death of a loved one

examples.x: After their long-term relationship ended, she was left with a broken heart and struggled to move on.
He felt his heart shatter into a million pieces when he discovered his partner's infidelity, leaving him with a broken heart and a loss of trust.
She poured her emotions into her songs, singing about her broken heart and the pain of lost love.
The rejection from her dream job left her with a broken heart, questioning her worth and future prospects.
The sudden death of her beloved pet left her with a broken heart, grieving deeply for weeks.

senses.definition: a time that is arranged to meet a person with whom one is in a relationship or is likely to be in the future

examples.x: She was excited about her date with him at the new Italian restaurant.
They went to the movies on their first date and had a wonderful time.
He asked her out on a date to the local art museum.
After their third date, they realized they had a lot in common.
She spent hours getting ready for her date, hoping to make a good impression.

senses.definition: someone or something that is visually attractive but may not have much substance or depth

examples.x: The movie was filled with special effects and eye candy, but the plot was weak.
He’s often dismissed as just eye candy, but he’s a talented actor as well.
The magazine was filled with images of eye candy models in designer clothes.
The sports car wasn’t very practical, but it was certainly eye candy.
Her Instagram is full of eye candy photos of exotic locations and beautiful scenery.

senses.definition: a young attractive man who is considered to be the perfect boyfriend or husband
a romantic, often secret relationship between two people who love one another but are not married to each other

examples.x: They embarked on a passionate love affair that took them on adventures around the world.
The scandalous love affair between the celebrity and their co-star was the talk of the town.
She regretted her brief love affair with her colleague, knowing it could complicate their professional relationship.
The novel explores the complexities of a forbidden love affair set against the backdrop of war.
Their love affair blossomed unexpectedly during a summer spent together at the beach house.

senses.definition: a powerful and intense emotion or feeling toward something or someone, often driving one's actions or beliefs

examples.x: His passion for music led him to spend countless hours practicing and composing songs.
She spoke with passion about environmental conservation, advocating for sustainable practices.
The couple's passion for each other was evident in their loving gestures and affectionate words.
Teaching with passion, he inspired his students to pursue their dreams and goals.
The artist's passion for painting was evident in the vibrant colors and expressive brushstrokes of her work.

senses.definition: a young person's strong, yet brief feeling of love toward someone

examples.x: Their puppy love quickly faded as they grew older and went their separate ways.
The summer camp romance was a classic case of puppy love.
Many people look back on their teenage crushes as puppy love.
He reminisced about his first puppy love with a smile, knowing it was just a phase.
Their puppy love was sweet, but it didn’t survive the test of time.

senses.definition: a love letter that a person sends to their beloved on Valentine's Day, sometimes without signing it

examples.x: She received a mysterious Valentine with a sweet poem but no signature.
He penned a heartfelt Valentine and left it on her desk as a surprise.
The Valentine was filled with romantic verses and had her guessing who sent it.
Every year, he would write a Valentine for his partner to make her feel special.
The Valentine arrived anonymously, adding a touch of intrigue to the day.

senses.definition: to love and respect someone very much

examples.x: She adores her grandmother for her wisdom and kindness.
He adores his wife for her unwavering support and understanding.
The children adore their teacher for her patience and encouragement.
I adore my dog for his loyalty and companionship.
They adore their parents for the sacrifices they've made for the family.

senses.definition: to invite someone on a date, particularly a romantic one
to start loving someone deeply

examples.x: They met at a coffee shop and quickly fell in love.
After many years of friendship, they finally fell in love with each other.
The couple fell in love during a summer vacation in Italy.
She didn't expect to fall in love while studying abroad, but it happened.
Falling in love can be a beautiful and life-changing experience.

senses.definition: to regularly spend time with a person that one likes and has a sexual or romantic relationship with

examples.x: They started going out in college and have been a couple ever since.
Are they still going out, or did they break up?
She's going out with someone she met at a party last month.
He asked her to go out with him, and she happily agreed.
Many people prefer to go out for a date on Valentine's Day.

senses.definition: to try to make someone love one, especially for marriage

examples.x: He tried to woo her with flowers and heartfelt letters, hoping to win her heart.
She was wooed by his sincerity and dedication to their relationship.
In medieval times, knights would woo their ladies with chivalrous deeds and poetry.
He spent months trying to woo her with romantic dinners and thoughtful gifts.
She was impressed by his efforts to woo her, from handwritten love notes to surprise weekend getaways.

senses.definition: to have a brief sexual relationship with a person

examples.x: They hooked up at the party after getting to know each other.
They decided to hook up after being friends for a long time.
He hooked up with her after they met at the club.
She doesn't usually hook up with guys she just met, but she made an exception that night.
She was hesitant to hook up with him, but eventually decided to take the risk.

senses.definition: to be romantically or sexually attracted to a person that one is not in a relationship with

examples.x: Did she have a crush on Ryan?
Kazumi seemed to have a crush on me.

senses.definition: a bruise left on a person's skin, especially their neck, as a result of a passionate kiss or bite by their lover

examples.x: She had a noticeable hickey on her neck after their passionate embrace.
His friend teased him about the hickey he got from his date last night.
The hickey was visible even though she tried to cover it with makeup.
They both laughed about the hickey that had accidentally been left behind.
The hickey was a clear sign of their intense affection for each other.
